$description: Graphite (§21, anchor L 0.30). Ramp ratified 2026-07-12; C=0 exactly (the old 0.004 hue-275 tint read as lavender and was removed). Dark world: chrome direction raises (interaction moves toward ink, §7); transient is a real raised step (§6), no longer a placeholder.

alx.role: deep grouped-control well (material round 2026-07-22): the segmented track, darker than panel so the panel-level pill rises out of it by tone.
the deep register step / tint pressed (no longer selection — see surface.pill). +2 register steps (2026-07-13); sits ≈ hairline (0.40) — lawful, validator watch
ON-PANEL selection fill (material round 2026-07-22): dark worlds RAISE, so selection lifts above panel — used by tabs/toggles. Carried by ink.1 + semibold.

IN-WELL selection ceiling (material round 2026-07-22): the segmented pill, lifted above panel (0.30) and well above the sunken track (0.24) so it reads by value alone (borderless). A touch above surface.pill for the stronger in-well lift dark needs.
raised above panel (§6): shadow alone does not read on dark chrome

retuned 2026-07-13 (was 0.80): dark ramps were compressed at the top (gap 0.13 vs light's 0.17) and light-on-dark blooms — labels now recede behind values as on light themes. Verified in library/type-probe.html card 6.
retuned with ink.2 (was 0.685) to keep the ladder spaced
